teacherPerformanceInsightDescription: Use this score to spot whether your assessments are landing at the right difficulty and where students may need a clearer lesson sequence.
teacherSubjectsSpotlightTitle: Your subjects are ready for the next lesson
teacherSubjectsSpotlightDescription: Jump straight into a subject-focused lesson studio instead of starting from a generic management table.
teacherSubjectsEmptyDescription: Once an administrator assigns subjects to your account, they will appear here and in your teaching dashboard.
teacherSubjectsPageDescription: Browse every subject assigned to you and jump directly into a focused lesson studio.
teacherSubjectsHeroTitle: Every assigned subject, ready for action
teacherSubjectsHeroDescription: Use these subject cards as your launchpad. Open a focused lesson view, keep your class context, and build the next resource without digging through management tables.

teacherSubjectsEmptyFilteredDescription: Try a different search or grade filter to find one of your assigned subjects.
teacherAddLessonHeroDescription: You are working inside {{subject}} for {{classDisplay}}. Build a polished lesson that stays focused on this subject from the first click.
roleLogicTitle: Own your content, teach with confidence
roleLogicDescription: Teachers can create subjects, lessons, and tests, then edit or delete only the content they created. Administrators keep full moderation rights across the platform, while students focus on learning and assessment.
studentOverviewDescription: Track your recent performance, continue lessons, and keep your learning momentum strong.
stayOnTrackTitle: Stay on track with your next learning goal
stayOnTrackDescription: You are performing consistently well. Continue with lessons and tests to maintain your average score and strengthen your subject confidence.
weeklyGoalDescription: Two more completed activities will push you past this week’s target.
schoolPortalDescription: Welcome to the approved student portal of Mathematics High School "Academic Kiril Popov". Here you can access learning materials, complete lessons and tests, and follow your progress in a structured academic environment.
interfacePreferencesDescription: Choose the language and visual theme that feel best for your daily work.
platformLanguageDescription: This preference is saved on this device for your next visit.
themeModeDescription: Switch between a bright workspace and a darker evening view.
personalizationHubDescription: Fine-tune your cursor, card atmosphere, sound cues, and brand accent from one polished control center.
cursorSelectorDescription: Choose how the pointer behaves across the workspace.
glassmorphismLevelDescription: Adjust the blur and transparency used by glass panels throughout the app.
uiSoundsDescription: Enable subtle bubble clicks and a soft wave on successful actions.
brandAccentDescription: Apply a shared accent color to buttons, highlights, and interactive details.
changePasswordDescription: Keep your account secure with a strong password that only you know.
passwordRuleShort: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol.
profileImageDescription: Upload a personal image for this device. You can change it anytime.
adminSettingsDescription: Administrator settings stay intentionally minimal here, with account preferences and security only.
teacherSettingsDescription: Teacher settings currently focus on your account and workspace preferences. More teaching-specific options can be added later.
studentSettingsDescription: Student settings focus on your personal preferences, theme, language, and password security.
accountSettingsDescriptionAdmin: Account preferences and security controls for your administrator access.
accountSettingsDescriptionTeacher: Update your teaching workspace preferences, account security, and profile details.
accountSettingsDescriptionStudent: Manage your learning preferences, account security, and personal profile details.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.description: This page explains what information EduPlatform collects, how it is used, and how we protect user data across the platform.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.body: We collect basic account information such as your username, email address, and user role to create and manage your access to EduPlatform. We may also store learning-related data such as progress, submitted tests, and lesson activity within the platform.

use.title: How We Use Information
use.body: Your information is used to authenticate your account, provide access to educational content, manage approvals, and send important platform notifications. We use this data only to support the educational experience and platform administration.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.body: Account and learning data are stored securely in the platform database and are used only for operational, academic, and support purposes. We take reasonable steps to limit access to authorized administrators and system processes.

rights.title: User Rights
rights.body: Users have the right to ask questions about their stored data, request correction of inaccurate account information, and contact the platform administrators if they believe their data is being handled improperly. Access-related changes are also communicated through the platform and email notifications.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.body: If you have questions about privacy, account access, or data handling on EduPlatform, you can contact the support team for clarification and assistance.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.description: Reach out if you need help with approvals, account access, or anything related to the platform. We are here to support students, teachers, and administrators.
contactPage.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully. We will review it shortly.
contactPage.submitError: Failed to send your message. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.messageTooShort: Your message should be at least 10 characters long.

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you.

info.title: Support email
info.description: For account approvals, login problems, or general help with the platform, contact the EduPlatform support inbox directly.
info.helper: You can use the form for a quick message or open your email client directly using the address above.

hero.description: A modern academic workspace for smart lessons, secure exams, and confident progress tracking.

intro.title: Built to make digital learning feel clear, structured, and trustworthy
intro.description: EduPlatform combines content delivery, protected assessment sessions, and role-based academic workflows in one polished product. It gives students a calmer learning experience, gives teachers a cleaner publishing workflow, and gives administrators stronger visibility over the whole platform.

smartLearning.title: Smart learning delivery
smartLearning.description: EduPlatform organizes lessons, media, and structured access into a clean digital learning flow that feels intuitive for students and efficient for staff.

protectedExams.title: Protected exam sessions
protectedExams.description: Built-in focus monitoring, automatic submission rules, and secure scoring help schools run online assessments with more confidence.

teacherStudio.title: Teacher content studio
teacherStudio.description: Teachers and administrators can publish rich lessons, attach resources, and create polished tests from one connected workspace.

gallery.title: A closer look at the EduPlatform experience

learningUx.title: Product-grade learning UX
learningUx.subtitle: Students move through lessons and tests in a calmer, clearer environment that supports focus and consistency.

assessmentIntegrity.title: Assessment with integrity
assessmentIntegrity.subtitle: Secure testing tools, result tracking, and cleaner review flows help teams trust what the platform records.

connectedWorkspace.title: One connected workspace
connectedWorkspace.subtitle: EduPlatform brings content, learners, and operations together instead of spreading them across disconnected tools.

statistics.title: Live statistics from EduPlatform
statistics.loadFailed: Unable to load live platform statistics right now.

office.title: Connect with the EduPlatform team
office.supportDescription: Reach the platform team for account access, onboarding, and product questions.
office.mapTitle: Map of the EduPlatform operations office

reviews.title: Feedback from the EduPlatform community
reviews.loginRequired: Log in to share your experience.
reviews.submitSuccess: Thanks for sharing your experience with EduPlatform.

defaults.review1: The lessons feel much easier to follow now, and the dashboard finally makes progress feel visible.
defaults.review2: Content Studio saves time. I can build a full lesson and test flow without jumping through different tools.
defaults.review3: The test results are clearer and I always know what I answered and where I need to improve.
defaults.review4: The approval and content management flows finally feel like part of one professional system.

reviewModal.title: Share your experience
reviewModal.commentPlaceholder: Tell us what feels polished, useful, or worth improving.
